title: A method and devices to support new radio (nr) transmission without grant
abstract: A method for enabling a wireless communication device to access services provided by a Radio Access Network, the method comprising: identifying a transmission of a first wireless communications device, which transmits a grant free transmission to a second wireless communications device, wherein parameters are included for identification of at least one of the first wireless communication device and one or more transmission formats.
